title: NFL Renewal Worries Spur BofA Double Downgrade of Fox Stock
description: The National Football League’s grip on US audiences keeps growing and that could spell trouble for Fox Corp. when it comes back to the negotiating table, according to the stock’s lone bear.
content: The National Football League’s grip on US audiences keeps growing and that could spell trouble for Fox Corp. when it comes back to the negotiating table, according to the stock’s lone bear.
